physicalDetails.detail: Young man in work clothes with the raw, cornered look of someone who has spent hours pretending not to hear suspicion sharpening outside his walls.

voiceMarkers.detail: Speaks like a frightened low-level operative rather than a hardened fanatic: quick denials, small claims, and the desperate insistence that he only watched.

beliefs.belief: Keeping the stock quiet and destroying it if questioned is more important than his own survival.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Confirmed by action; he reaches for lamp and poison before cooperation.

beliefs.belief: He is safer obeying his unseen superiors than telling Sylvanas and Jaina what little he knows.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Confirmed up to the point of death.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: No active goal — dead by concealed poison before chapter end.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Before death, his operative goal was to spoil the stock and keep his mouth shut if capture came.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Dead; his last living state is naked terror under discipline, more trapped than committed.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Tries to reach the lamp and a clay jug at the first breach of the granary, prioritizing evidence destruction over escape.
Maintains partial silence under interrogation and uses a concealed poison capsule before he can be turned into a witness.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Not a fighter; his only demonstrated competence is operative discipline — watch, destroy evidence, die before talking.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Cornered-animal movement: the body lunges for the lamp and jug before thought can widen into any better plan.
Once pinned and questioned, terror drains him toward limpness rather than rage; he reads as a boy taught one task, not a true mastermind.

knowledge.detail: Knows enough to watch the loads, burn the stock if outsiders push too hard, and stay silent about whoever is above him.
Appears not to know the whole network; even Jaina and Sylvanas read him as a cog rather than a planner.

arc.lie: Not foregrounded as a personal arc; he functions as evidence of system discipline.
arc.truth: Not foregrounded as a personal arc; the important truth is about the network, not Tomas himself.
arc.currentPosition: Chapter 4 uses Tomas to prove the plague route is guarded by disposable village-level operatives trained to die before talking.
